Committed Towards Clean & Green Environment! Your One-stop Dumpster Rental

Affordable Dumpster & Garbage Bin Rentals For Homes & Businesses

Serving Toronto, Mississauga, Brampton, Burlington, Oakville, Etobicoke & More

Are you are planning a renovation project or need to clean some garbage or junk from your house or office? Then we can provide you our garbage bin rental services in Ontario. We serve the areas of Toronto, Mississauga, Brampton, Burlington, Oakville, Etobicoke & other surrounding Areas.

At Purple Dumpster, we take care of all your disposal needs. Whether you want to throw away your old furniture, broken appliances, damaged electronics, construction waste, or any other junk, we have you covered. Our licensed and dedicated professionals provide high-quality service at affordable prices. No job is too big or small for us. Our goal is to make the entire process simple, quick, and efficient.

Our Disposal Bins Can Be Used For:

Garbage and Junk Removal

Remove your house or office junk once and for all.

Attic and Basement Clean-Out

Reclaim your basement by removing all the clutter.

Fall and Spring
Cleaning

Get ready for summer by prepping your home.

Winter Storm Debris Removal

Get rid of broken tree limbs or other storm damages.

Closet and Storage
Purge

Get rid of the old possessions that you no longer use.

Office Remodel Or Home Renovations

Changing your home or office or upgrading rooms.

Yard Waste
Cleanup

Remove like broken trees, leaves or clippings.

Storeroom
Clear-Out

Clear out old expired inventory that has no value.

We Look Forward To Providing You With The Outstanding Service That You Deserve!

Contact Us

How To Rent A Bin

It’s very simple and efficient to rent a bin from Purple Dumpster. Call us to discuss your needs, for when and where you need a dumpster. We will deliver the dumpster to your location and guarantee unmatched customer service.

  • Our professionals will deliver the dumpster bin rental to your location.
  • You can fill the bin with any kind of waste you may have; drywall, dirt, roofing, trash, garbage or general junk.
  • When all your junk is loaded, just call us and we will come to pick it up. It’s that simple.

Why Choose Purple Dumpster?

When your air conditioner or fan coil is not working as desired, or you need to see the better days, call our professionals to fix the problem fast and get your home comfortable again.

Licensed

We are a fully licensed and insured garbage removal service committed to providing safe, efficient, and affordable solutions.

Multi-Purpose

Our garbage bin rental is perfect for construction waste, garage and basement clean outs, renovation jobs, and any other junk.

Fair Price

We offer our residential and commercial clients with the best price and service in Ontario. Call to request a free quote!
